name: B2B Logistics Visibility SaaS for Informal Carriers
problem_statement: Small trucking operators (1-10 trucks) have no visibility into their fleet or cargo. They coordinate via WhatsApp voice notes. No software exists at their price point ($0-30/mo).
target_customer: Owner-operator trucking companies with 1-10 vehicles in LATAM
trigger_signal: Reddit thread: 300+ upvotes on 'how do small carriers track loads without TMS?'
evidence_summary: Multiple Reddit/Twitter threads, Fleetio reviews, fragmented WhatsApp coordination visible in Facebook groups

name: WhatsApp-Native Invoicing for Colombian SMBs
problem_statement: Colombian SMBs (restaurants, retailers, service businesses) still issue paper invoices or use WhatsApp screenshots. DIAN electronic invoice mandate is rolling out -- they need a dead-simple $10/mo solution.
target_customer: Colombian SMB owners, 1-5 employees, restaurants and retail, not tech-savvy
trigger_signal: DIAN mandate enforcement Q3 2026 -- news coverage spike in El Tiempo
why_now: DIAN electronic invoice mandate rollout creates mandatory adoption pressure for all SMBs in 2026
evidence_summary: DIAN mandate news, Siigo/Alegra reviews on G2, WhatsApp groups with SMB owners discussing panic about compliance

name: USD Collection Layer for Venezuelan Freelancers
problem_statement: Venezuelan freelancers (designers, devs, VAs) earn in USD via Paypal or Deel but lose 5-15% to conversion + withdrawal fees. There is no dead-simple USD collection + Zelle routing solution for non-banked Venezuelan freelancers.
target_customer: Venezuelan remote workers, 25-40, earning $300-2000/mo in USD, using WhatsApp for client communication
trigger_signal: Upwork + LinkedIn data: Venezuela remote workers up 340% since 2021. Twitter/X thread with 2.1k likes on PayPal withdrawal pain.
why_now: Remote work boom post-2021 + PayPal Venezuela restrictions + USDT/Binance P2P normalization creates perfect window for a dedicated collection layer
evidence_summary: Twitter thread 2.1k likes, Reddit r/vzla payment complaints, Deel vs PayPal fee comparison posts in VE freelancer groups
path_to_first_revenue: Cold outreach to 50 Venezuelan freelancers on LinkedIn -> offer free USD account + 1% fee vs 8% PayPal -> 5 paying in week 1
